command:
cd /tmp/moreno-ai-setup

echo "=== STORE PRODUCTION BASELINE ==="
cp runtime/memory_runtime.py baselines/production/memory_runtime.py 2>/dev/null || \
  (mkdir -p baselines/production && cp runtime/memory_runtime.py baselines/production/memory_runtime.py)

echo "=== GIT ADD ==="
git add runtime/memory_runtime.py
git add memory/historical/ memory/stories/ memory/shared/
git add agents/sakura/MEMORY.md
git add baselines/production/memory_runtime.py 2>/dev/null || true
git status --short | grep -v "^??" | head -20

echo ""
echo "=== COMMIT ==="
git commit -m "Phase 9E.2 Memory Runtime — read write search list archive operational"

echo ""
echo "=== TAG ==="
git tag Phase9E2-MemoryRuntime

echo ""
echo "=== PUSH ==="
git push origin main && git push origin Phase9E2-MemoryRuntime
git push github main && git push github Phase9E2-MemoryRuntime

echo ""
echo "=== FINAL LOG ==="
git log --oneline -5
git tag -l | tail -8
